title: Race Of Veterans
content:
Race of veterans! Race of victors!
Race of the soil, ready for conflict! race of the conquering march!
(No more credulity's race, abiding-temper'd race;)
Race henceforth owning no law but the law of itself;
Race of passion and the storm.
meaning:
Walt Whitman's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Race Of Veterans"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
